film.title: De Dana Dan
film.overview: Two down on their luck men try to kidnap a wealthy businesswoman's dog to demand a hefty ransom from her.  But things go haywire when the dog goes missing.

dialogues.dialogue: I think, we Indians should get together.. and, hold a demonstration against her. And, stop going to her mall. I didn't feel any shame, I danced so vigorously. Heera speaking.' - Hello. Yes, Suri, I'm leaving now.

But he hasn't arrived. He hasn't arrived. He's our relative. Aren't you ashamed....your relative is such a rascal? You will have to inform me as soon as he arrives. I've been looking for him for the past one year.

I want to die. I want to die. You've defamed the entire family by calling this cheap girl here. Aren't you ashamed of doing such cheap things? What shall I do? Shall I wait or leave? Get lost, or else I'll throw you out of the window.
Quiet. Forgive me. I feel ashamed to say that, he's my brother-in-law. I apologise to you. I'll give you Rs. 5 lakh more. For the sake of my family's honour.

You're right, she's pregnant.....that's why they can't get married. You know all about it. What can we do? We can offer her some money.....make a deal with her.. - Scoundrel, aren't you ashamed. Scoundrel, your son is engaged with such a woman. What happened? What happened?
dialogues.cause_raw: getting a woman pregnant before marriage

dialogues.dialogue: I've heard that voice before? Don't try to be a detective. Give me the money. Aren't you ashamed of doing these things? Does your mother know you're doing these things? My mother is no more, give me the money.
If anyone finds out about this.....we won't be able to face anyone. They should know his true colours. Look“ - He's the pride of your family. The honour of the Lambas. Please, calm down.
